emails.subject: Re: Transwestern's comments at 5/22 CPUC hearing
emails.body: Re: Transwestern's comments at 5/22 CPUC hearing Nice job. Only comment is that the crazies in California now find market power under every rock and in every pipeline. I think there's a chance that someone might assert that 20% share equals market power. Might want to say "significant supplier" or something similar. No big deal, but I thought I'd flag it for your consideration. Best, Jeff

emails.subject: Re: Transwestern's comments at 5/22 CPUC hearing
emails.body: Re: Transwestern's comments at 5/22 CPUC hearing Nice job. Only comment is that the crazies in California now find market power under every rock and in every pipeline. emails.subject: Transwestern's comments at 5/22 CPUC hearing
emails.body: Thanks for the tip. We made the change. You didn't miss much on the call this a.m. Most people were scratching their heads wondering what precisely the Commission was expecting to get from this proceeding. We talked about the "focus" of our comments, making sure that most of the important elements of the Comprehensive Settlement were to be discussed. With the possible exception of ORA, I think we've got our original contingent intact and will be represented in tomorrow's meeting. Mark will be giving our little presentation for TW. Please feel free to pitch in and help Mark out if the Commission or others in the audience start taking shots at TW. I look forward to hearing from you guys after its over. Good luck. Regards, Jeff
